zh.Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德
zh.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh於1230年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯時，他的父親Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh28歲，母親Helen Calder16歲。他於大約1260年與Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1263年登記服兵役。他去世於1265年在蘇格蘭享年35歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德
zh-hans.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh于1230年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯时，他的父亲Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh28岁，母亲Helen Calder16岁。他于大约1260年与Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1263年登记服兵役。他去世于1265年在苏格兰享年35岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Ferquhar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of   Fearchar .  In modern use as a given name it may also be a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

en.lifeSummary: When Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh was born in 1230, in Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh, was 28 and his mother, Helen Calder, was 16. He married Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay about 1260, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1263. He died in 1265, in Scotland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh est né en 1230, à Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Helen Calder, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay environ 1260, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1263. Il est décédé en 1265, à Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh 1230 in Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh 28 und seine Mutter Helen Calder 16. Er hat um 1260 in Scotland Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1263 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1265 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh è nato il nel 1230 nel Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Helen Calder, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay circa 1260, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1263. Morì nel 1265, nel Scotland, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルイスレイ イスランド
ja.Inverness-shire, Scotland: スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイア
ja.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロスイエムルチウス
ja.lifeSummary: Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintoshが1230年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロスイエムルチウスで生まれた時，父Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintoshは28歳，母Helen Calderは16歳であった。約1260年にスコットランドでMora Mor MacDonald of Islayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年に兵役登録をした。彼は1265年にスコットランドで35歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh(이)가 1230년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 로스이머c후스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Calder(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 스컷랜드에서 Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1265년 스컷랜드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh nasceu em 1230, em Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Helen Calder, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay aproximadamente 1260, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1263. Ele faleceu em 1265, em Scotland, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh родился в 1230 г. в местности ротиемурчус, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Calder, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay около 1260 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1263 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1265 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh nació en 1230, en Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Shaw Mackintosh 4th Of Mackintosh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Helen Calder, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay aproximadamente 1260, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1263. Murió en 1265, en Scotland, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
